name: Hot Ones: The Game Show
overview: In each episode of this hilarious game show, host Sean Evans welcomes fans into the “Pepperdome” to compete against one another by answering trivia questions and eating increasing mouth-scorching hot wings for $25,000 and the chance to become Hot Ones legends.

trailers.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show - Official Trailer | Sean Evans is Bringing the Heat on February 18 | truTV
